violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed boxes of food stored on the floor in walk in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Observed fan in walk in freezer was missing the protective screen.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Microwave, prep tables, fans contained grease and needed to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors, walls and ceilings were greasy.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items . Lights above cooking area did not have a protective shield.

General premises. — --Observed hanging light above the deep fryer area in kitchen did not have a light shield and was plugged into outlet with extension cord.--Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Vent to outside located in kitchen does not have protection against insects or rodents entering.
